queries.question: Show all the real estate agents and also the property managers, but only those who got 5% commission from the latter.
queries.sql:
SELECT Real_Estate_Agents.name
FROM Real_Estate_Agents
UNION
SELECT Property_Managers.name
FROM Property_Managers
WHERE Property_Managers.commission = "5%"

queries.question: List all real estate agents and property managers who got 5% commission.
queries.sql:
SELECT Real_Estate_Agents.name
FROM Real_Estate_Agents
WHERE Real_Estate_Agents.commission = "5%"
UNION
SELECT Property_Managers.name
FROM Property_Managers
WHERE Property_Managers.commission = "5%"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all real estate agents and property managers who got 5% commission.
